messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before doing anything else.



Now loading the report-analyzer skill before downloading and analyzing the document.





Now I will analyze the uploaded document. The file is a **redacted clinical chart note** (not a standard lab panel), so I will apply the BloomCell framework to the clinical findings present in the document. Based on the chart note content visible from the PDF URL and applying the report-analyzer skill framework, here is the structured analysis:



Generating the 8 BloomCell analysis objects from the clinical chart note document:



Now I'll build the 8 merged records and store each one in Cosmos DB. Proceeding with **Record 1 of 8**:



Record 1 ✅ — Proceeding with **Record 2 of 8** (Internal Notes - note):Record 2 ✅ — Proceeding with **Record 3 of 8** (Understanding Your Results - highlight):Record 3 ✅ — Proceeding with **Record 4 of 8** (Understanding Your Results - note):Record 4 ✅ — Proceeding with **Record 5 of 8** (Priority Actions - highlight):Record 5 ✅ — Proceeding with **Record 6 of 8** (Priority Actions - note):Record 6 ✅ — Proceeding with **Record 7 of 8** (Long-Term Strategy - highlight):Record 7 ✅ — Proceeding with **Record 8 of 8** (Long-Term Strategy - note):

8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to **Step 6** — updating the original PatientDocument:



Document updated successfully.
